Land Application Form

Land2Living Community Registry — To be submitted to the council secretary

APP-______-___
Instructions: Complete all fields in block letters. Two copies required — give one to the applicant. Submit the council copy to the council secretary the same day. If submitting on behalf of a resident, include your foot soldier details below.
1. Applicant Details
2. Application Type
3. Stand Details
4. Reason for Application
5. Foot Soldier Details (if submitting on behalf of applicant)
Applicant Signature & Date
Foot Soldier Signature & Date (if applicable)
Land2Living Digital Registry — paper form v1.0 — 2026
